title: Context Report
description: Schema for a shared context report written to .agents/context/{report-type}/{key}.md. Reports use YAML frontmatter and a markdown body.

skill.description: Name of the skill that produced the report.

version.description: Schema or skill version of the report.

key.description: Identifier for the report, often a ticket key, branch name, or session id.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the report was generated.

artifacts.description: Paths to related artifacts, linked rather than duplicated.
